ValidationRule.description: 12.12.2017, ary: Gleiche Bemerkung wie bei Account
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, RecordType.Id = '012b0000000bub6', OR( AND( ISBLANK (LocationStreetNr__c), ISBLANK (Phone), ISBLANK (MobilePhone), ISBLANK (Email) ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please fill out one of the following fields: "Location Street, Nr", "Phone", "Mobile", or "Email". (CO002)
